title: IVR Call Job
description: IVR v1 call job contract for order confirmation only. A call job is owned by IVR execution but cannot mutate order state directly.
$comment: Sources: PACK-09, TECH-09, and Phase 8 SRS. Golden Hour has two customer-counted attempts; 24/7 has three customer-counted attempts. Technical retries are separate.

task_id.description: Order Core to IVR task identifier.

official_order_id.description: Official Order identifier. Quote, Cart, and Order Draft are not eligible.

order_version.description: Order version or concurrency token observed when the task was created.

attempt_policy_code.description: Policy code that resolved the max attempt and window values.

call_purpose.description: Invariant: IVR is only for order confirmation.

max_attempts.description: Max customer-counted attempts resolved by program policy.

attempt_schedule.description: Planned customer-counted attempts. Technical retries are not modeled as customer attempts.

eligible.description: Whether order is eligible for IVR order confirmation.

official_contact_id.description: Official contact selected by Order Core.

phone_ref.description: Reference to the official phone value; avoid storing raw phone in IVR contracts.

phone_masked.description: Masked phone number for admin display and evidence review.

sale_lock_active.description: Whether latest revalidation found a Sale Lock.

recall_active.description: Whether latest revalidation found an active Recall.

call_restriction_active.description: Whether opt-out or policy prevents calling.

queue_status.description: Queue state or admin hold state.

script_version.description: IVR script version used for calls.

privacy_policy_version.description: Privacy/retention policy version applied to call evidence.

not_for_quote_cart_draft.description: Invariant: IVR does not run for Quote, Cart, or Order Draft.

input_signal_only.description: Invariant: IVR output is an input signal for Order Core.

no_direct_order_update.description: Invariant: IVR must not directly update order state.
